category_sources: Official libbladeRF docs say the library supports Nuand bladeRF USB 3.0 SDR devices.
source_facts.description says USB 3.0 Superspeed Software Defined Radio Source.
display_name_sources: Official Nuand documentation title uses libbladeRF.
docs_sources: Official Nuand libbladeRF documentation is a dedicated API documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Nuand/bladeRF, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Nuand docs describe bladeRF device configuration, streaming, firmware, and FPGA support.
source_facts.description identifies software-defined radio hardware support.
